step_by_step_thinking:
I agree with the initial assessment but would add another detail supporting why drug-induced conditions are favored here. In patients presenting with symptoms so extensive, it’s crucial to consider recent medications they may have taken since many antibiotics and anticonvulsants can precipitate SJS/TEN. Therefore:

**Answer:** D

This additional rationale reinforces the importance of reviewing current medications as part of the diagnostic process.
